sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current position of the active box
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(48, 58):
    print(f"{i}: {lines[i][30:63]}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"\nActive W pixel at: {n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
